S.FORM: 2024 a mihcaan misingkiw nu cong-tung Cunghuwaminku ci cacay a misingkiw nu cong-tung Cunghuwaminku, palekal tu 2024 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 13 a demiad. == misinkiway ==
S.PHON: **** a miħʦaan misiŋkiw nu ʦoŋ-tuŋ ʦuŋħuwaminku ʦi ʦaʦaj a misiŋkiw nu ʦoŋ-tuŋ ʦuŋħuwaminku, par~ɾəkar~ɾ tu **** a miħʦaan * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad. == misinkiwaj ==
S.FORM: 2024 a mihcaan misingkiw nu cong-tung Cunghuwaminku ci cacay a misingkiw nu cong-tung Cunghuwaminku, palekal tu 2024 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 13 a demiad. == misinkiway ==
S.PHON: **** a miħʦaan misiŋkiw nu ʦoŋ-tuŋ ʦuŋħuwaminku ʦi ʦaʦaj a misiŋkiw nu ʦoŋ-tuŋ ʦuŋħuwaminku, par~ɾəkar~ɾ tu **** a miħʦaan * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad. == misinkiwaj ==
